location: Purchased for 1,800 runes from the Nomadic Merchant camped under a collapsed stone ruin on the beach southeast of Coastal Cave, West Limgrave. Also the starting weapon of the Confessor class.
tactics: Fast travel to the Coastal Cave Site of Grace, then follow the beach south/southeast to the merchant's campfire under the broken ruin.
Costs 1,800 runes unless you started as Confessor, who has it equipped from the beginning.
No combat required — it's a straightforward shop purchase.
lore: A standard-issue straight sword with a wide blade meant for broad slashing strikes — an unremarkable but dependable soldier's weapon rather than anything exceptional.

builds.name: Early Str/Dex quality
builds.why: D Strength / E Dexterity scaling and solid base attack power make it a cheap, no-fuss opener before you find a signature weapon.
